mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username AS sender_name, u.avatar AS sender_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT m.*, u.username AS receiver_name, u.avatar AS receiver_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.receiver_id = u.id WHERE m.sender_id = #{senderId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT m.*, u1.username AS sender_name, u1.avatar AS sender_avatar, u2.username AS receiver_name, u2.avatar AS receiver_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u1 ON m.sender_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON m.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId1} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (m.sender_id = #{userId2} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_id, receiver_id, content, create_time, is_read) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = true WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND sender_id = #{senderId} AND is_read = false
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = false
